text:
Waiver Type Code (7th Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the 7th of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of the 
12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_07_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_07_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_07_11
